Megonut is crazy delusional and often comes across as out of touch with reality. Many of her efforts seem to backfire, yet she tends to blame others instead of taking accountability. It’s hard to respect someone who refuses to own their mistakes.

But it seems she genuinely believes she's always right and they're always wrong. video_title: With Love, Meghan | How to Make a Fruit Rainbow | Sneak Peek | Netflix
comment_text: I disliked Meghan from the moment I first saw her in the engagement interview. There was something annoying in the girlie giggly demeanor of a grown woman. But I gave her the benefit of the doubt; she must have been nervous and desperate to be liked and not mess things up. I cannot say I ever warmed to her. She is extremely careful in crafting her image, which is something so foreign to me ... I'd find it exhausting. Her naivity and ignorance when it comes to marrying into the royal family is weird, even for an American. I think she never took time to get to know ordinary British people. They are so warm and lovely when you get to know them. I don't hate Meghan, I just cannot relate to her. I appreciate both Meghan and Harry are in an awkward situation - they have to make money, on the other hand, if it wasn't for their association with the royal family, there would be no commercial interest in them. I think they don't realize how some of their efforts come across, I also think they were exploited to a degree, or at least got the wrong advice. I think the Oprah interview was a huge mistake and Oprah conducted it very, very poorly. To sum it up - I'm no fan of MM. But all the rabid hatred towards her makes me want to defend her. You may not like her, but why the hate? You can turn it off, her show, you don't have to read her book, the algorithm will follow suit. I think people channel their personal frustrations into hatred towards Meghan. Hundreds of vile YouTubers recognized the demand and are making a lot of money off saying things about MM that her haters want to hear. It's a sad testimony of our times. Clearly, it doesn't matter what this woman will do, these sad people will always hate her, she cannot do anything right in their books. The thing is, while they spend minutes and hours of their lives on Meghan, hating her, loathing her, she is living her life and doesn't know these people's names...
